data.title: Gold breaks $5K record high amid trade tensions, Bitcoin drops to $86K. Gold up 17% in January.
data.description: Amid escalating trade tensions, the price of gold surged to an all-time high, exceeding $5,000, in contrast to Bitcoin which experienced a significant drop to $86,000. This divergence in performance saw gold gain 17% in value throughout the month of January.

data.title: Americans are betting on snowfall in NYC, DC due to Winter Storm Fern. Over $700,000 wagered on NYC with 47% chance of 10-12 inches. In DC, 56% chance of 5-7 inches. Details on Benzinga.com.
data.description: Prediction markets are currently active in betting on snowfall totals in major cities as a severe winter storm causes power outages and flight disruptions. In New York City, over $700,000 is being wagered on Polymarket to predict the amount of snow the city will receive over the weekend. At present, there is a 47% probability that snowfall will range between 10 and 12 inches. The National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration will provide the final snowfall data. Meanwhile, in Washington, D.C., a similar market shows that bettors favor a 56% likelihood of 5-7 inches of snow in the capital. More details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Haier, the world's No.1 major home appliance brand, partners with Australian Open 2026, showcasing innovation and purpose.
data.description: In Melbourne, Australia on January 25, 2026, Haier, the top major home appliance brand globally, confirms its ongoing collaboration with the Australian Open for the year 2026. The partnership highlights Haier's presence at the renowned sporting event, taking place at Melbourne Park.
